gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/304)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/304)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ رَجُلٍ اسْتَأْجَرَ أَجِيراً فَلَمْ يَأْمَنْ أَحَدُهُمَا صَاحِبَهُ فَوَضَعَ الْأَجْرَ عَلَى يَدِ رَجُلٍ فَهَلَكَ ذَلِكَ الرَّجُلُ وَ لَمْ يَدَعْ وَفَاءً فَاسْتَهْلَكَ الْأَجْرُ فَقَالَ الْمُسْتَأْجِرُ ضَامِنٌ لِأَجْرِ الْأَجِيرِ حَتَّى يَقْضِيَ إِلَّا أَنْ يَكُونَ الْأَجِيرُ دَعَاهُ إِلَى ذَلِكَ فَرَضِيَ بِالرَّجُلِ فَإِنْ فَعَلَ فَحَقُّهُ حَيْثُ وَضَعَهُ وَ رَضِيَ بِهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Yazeed Bin Si’haq, from Haroun Bin Hamza who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a man who employed an employee. But, one of the two does not trust his companion, so the wages were placed upon a (third) man. So that man died, and did not get the wages paid. Thus the wages were destroyed. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The employer is responsible of the wages to the employee until it is paid, except if it so happened that the employee called for it to be that, so he was pleased with the (third) man (holding it). So if he did it, so his right would be wherever he placed it and was pleased with it’.
en.sarwar: 16. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ali ibn ’Isma‘il from Muhammad ibn ‘Amr from Ali ibn al-Hassan from Hariz from abu ‘Ubaydah who has narrated the following: “I once asked abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who gives one thousand dirham to a man to mix with his assets and use in trade. When he asks for payment, he says that the asset has gone along with an equal amount of assets that belongs to someone else with a great deal of funds of other people. He then asks, ‘What have the others done?’ He replies, ‘They took their assets? Abu Ja‘far, and abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhim al-Salam, both have said, ‘He can ask him (the trader) for his assets, who can then ask them for whatever (extra) they have taken?”
